steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to report overpayment of EUR 3,093.75 on DBK dividend for account 801234567
Request refund citing DE-NO tax treaty rate of 26.375% should apply vs. 25% withheld
Provide treaty documentation showing Norwegian resident status qualifies for reduced withholding
Follow up in 10 business days if no acknowledgment received from custodian

references.title: German Federal Ministry of Finance – Tax Treaties
